strengths: Direct AI agent development experience at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — an explicit job requirement
15+ years of full-stack engineering across TypeScript, Node.js, cloud (AWS CDK), MongoDB, Docker, and Kubernetes — covers most of the required stack
Strong testing culture demonstrated through TDD practice, community workshops, and open-source testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: NestJS not mentioned anywhere — the primary backend framework in the job's stack
React experience is thin and dated (Optilyz 2021–2025); most frontend history is Ember.js, not React
Kotlin not mentioned at all, and Java experience is old and peripheral — the secondary stack is largely absent
response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned engineer with genuine AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience that directly satisfies one of the role's harder-to-find requirements. His TypeScript and Node.js depth is solid, his cloud and containerization exposure is real, and his testing ethos is unusually strong. The main risk is the NestJS blind spot — it is the central backend framework and is absent from the resume — alongside limited React breadth. Both gaps are learnable for someone of his seniority, but they would require ramp-up time on core daily tooling.
